

=== Match index 33 | Tool: replace_file_content | Desc: "Fixing validityDays and credits fields for UNLIMITED and LIFETIME plans during cut credits migration." ===
"        const rawType = String(assign.CutCreditType || '').trim().toUpperCase();\n        let mappedPlanType = 'USAGE';\n        if (rawType.includes('UNLIMITED')) {\n          mappedPlanType = 'UNLIMITED';\n        } else if (rawType.includes('LIFETIME')) {\n          mappedPlanType = 'LIFETIME';\n        }\n\n        const cutCreditId = this.parseOrCreateUuid(`cutcredit-${legacyId}`);\n        const existingCredit = await (this.prisma as any).cutCredit.findUnique({ where: { id: cutCreditId } });\n        \n        const creditData = {\n          planType: mappedPlanType,\n          credits: mappedPlanType === 'USAGE' ? allocatedCredits : null,\n          validityDays: mappedPlanType === 'UNLIMITED' ? allocatedCredits : null,\n          ownerId: orgId,\n          tenantId: fromOrgId,\n          licenseId: legacyLicenseId || null,\n          createdAt: createdDate,\n          startDate: startDate,\n          endDate: endDate\n        };"


=== Match index 48 | Tool: replace_file_content | Desc: "Calculate validityDays from startDate and endDate during migration" ===
"        let calculatedValidityDays = null;\n        if (mappedPlanType === 'UNLIMITED') {\n          if (startDate && endDate) {\n            const ms = endDate.getTime() - startDate.getTime();\n            calculatedValidityDays = Math.ceil(ms / (1000 * 3600 * 24));\n          } else {\n            calculatedValidityDays = allocatedCredits;\n          }\n        }\n\n        const creditData = {\n          planType: mappedPlanType,\n          credits: mappedPlanType === 'USAGE' ? allocatedCredits : null,\n          validityDays: calculatedValidityDays,"


=== Match index 87 | Tool: replace_file_content | Desc: "Update validityDays logic to fallback to 365 days if calculation gives 0" ===
"        let calculatedValidityDays = null;\n        if (mappedPlanType === 'UNLIMITED') {\n          if (startDate && endDate) {\n            const ms = endDate.getTime() - startDate.getTime();\n            calculatedValidityDays = Math.ceil(ms / (1000 * 3600 * 24));\n            if (calculatedValidityDays <= 0) calculatedValidityDays = 365;\n          } else if (allocatedCredits > 0) {\n            calculatedValidityDays = allocatedCredits;\n          } else {\n            calculatedValidityDays = 365;\n          }\n        }"

=== Match index 2163 | Tool: replace_file_content | Desc: "Fixing the model map initialization to properly type the `number` key so TypeScript doesn't complain about a number-to-string mismatch." ===
"    // 3. model map: legacyId (int) -> UUID\n    let modelLegacyMap: Map<number, string>;\n    if (mapsCache?.modelLegacyMap) {\n      modelLegacyMap = mapsCache.modelLegacyMap;\n    } else {\n      const dbModels = await this.prisma.model.findMany({\n        where: { legacyId: { not: null } },\n        select: { id: true, legacyId: true }\n      });\n      modelLegacyMap = new Map<number, string>(\n        dbModels.filter(m => m.legacyId !== null).map(m => [m.legacyId as number, m.id])\n      );\n    }"


=== Match index 2167 | Tool: replace_file_content | Desc: "Cleaning up the org/user map initializations to use a simpler explicit pattern that avoids TypeScript inference issues." ===
"    // ── Build lookup maps ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    // 1. org map: legacyId -> UUID\n    let orgLegacyMap: Map<string, string>;\n    if (mapsCache?.orgLegacyMap) {\n      orgLegacyMap = mapsCache.orgLegacyMap;\n    } else {\n      const dbOrgs = await this.prisma.organization.findMany({\n        where: { legacyId: { not: null } },\n        select: { id: true, legacyId: true }\n      });\n      orgLegacyMap = new Map<string, string>(dbOrgs.map(o => [o.legacyId!, o.id]));\n    }\n\n    // 2. user map: legacyId -> UUID (for OwnerId = record creator)\n    let userLegacyMap: Map<string, string>;\n    if (mapsCache?.userLegacyMap) {\n      userLegacyMap = mapsCache.userLegacyMap;\n    } else {\n      const dbUsers = await this.prisma.user.findMany({\n        where: { legacyId: { not: null } },\n        select: { id: true, legacyId: true }\n      });\n      userLegacyMap = new Map<string, string>(dbUsers.map(u => [u.legacyId!, u.id]));\n    }"
